message:
feat: add 6 new demo sections with extended keyboard navigation

Expand the demo showcase from 6 to 12 sections with full keyboard
navigation support.

New sections:
- Drawing: Box styles, lines, fills demonstration
- Colors: Gradients, alpha blending, color modes
- Input: Cursor styles, focus events, paste handling
- Editing: EditBuffer, undo/redo, wrap modes
- Capabilities: Terminal capabilities detection
- Animations: Easing functions demonstration

Keyboard navigation changes:
- Keys 1-9: Sections 1-9 (Overview through Input)
- Key 0: Section 10 (Editing)
- Key -: Section 11 (Capabilities)
- Key =: Section 12 (Animations)

Implementation details:
- Section enum expanded with 6 new variants
- Section::ALL array now contains 12 entries
- key_hint() method returns key binding for sidebar display
- draw_pass_panels() routes new sections to stub render functions
- Help text updated to reflect extended navigation

Tests updated to verify:
- from_index() returns new sections at indices 6-11
- name() returns correct names for new sections

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
